title: Update footer link to GitHub mirror repository
description: The 'Powered by KNTIC Links' footer in the generated page currently links to https://kntic.ai. Update it to link to the public GitHub mirror at https://github.com/thomasrobak/kntic-links instead.

features: In src/generator.js, update the footer anchor href from 'https://kntic.ai' to 'https://github.com/thomasrobak/kntic-links'.
The link text 'Powered by KNTIC Links' stays the same — only the href changes.

notes: Do NOT clone or interact with the GitHub repository (https://github.com/thomasrobak/kntic-links) at any point. It is a read-only mirror. All work stays on GitLab.
